verses.text: Biakinnpi kisia ta a, suang kiciangte kongzing lakah a kithehthang hi. Khamtui tawh a kizut a tee daldalte mualmang khinzo ta hi
Kham bangin a manpha Jerusalem tangvalnote, leibeel bang lelin kibawl khinta hi
Keivom nangawn in zong a note itin a nawi pia thei buang napi, ka mite in vasa-kalaoh bangin a tanote a sugawp hi
Amaute in a ta ngekte uh gilkial dangtakin sisak uh a, naupangnote an ngen dingin vaksak uh a, kuamah in an a pia kei hi
An lim pen a ne ngeite kongzing lakah puksi uh a, nuamsa-in a khangkhia mite in ninbuakna lak thai-in an a zong uh hi
Jerusalem' mawhna Sodom khuapi' mawhna sangin lianzaw ahih manin, thakhatin Pasian' khutsung pan kisiatna a ngah uh hi
Pasian' mi dingin a kipia Nazir-te pen amau' pumpi uh a siasaklo, vuk bangin a ngo, a cidam, a thahat mite ahi uh hi
Tu-in amaute kuama theihlohin kongzing lakah tuk pekpak uh a, a si dingin a mai uh dup khin a, a vun uh sing bangin keugaw-in, a guhguakin a om uh hi
Nek ding neiloin puksih sangin galsungah a site hamphazaw lai hi. Annek ding neiloin a site a puksi ahi uh hi
Ka mite a cihmawh laitakun, itna a nei nupite nangawn in, a tanote uh go-in beel sungah a huan uh hi
Topa in a hehna khempeuh sit nawnloin hong buakhia a, meikuang tawh Jerusalem hong hal ahih manin a kangtum hi
Namdangte' gam ukte leh mi khempeuh Jerusalem a simzo ding kuamah omlo ding hi, ci-in a up laitakun hih thu hong piang hi
Kamsangte leh siampite in mawhna a bawl manun mi siangtho midikte' sihna a hong piang ahi hi
Amaute mittaw bangin kongzing lakah vak uh a, kuama lawn' ngamloh dingin silenai tawh a dim uh hi
Mite in, “Paikhia un, mi ninte aw, hong lawngkha kei un,” ci-in a kiko uh hi. Tua bangin minam khat khit nam khat kiangah pai kawikawi uh a, ahih hangin kuamah in amaute a ngai kei uh hi
Topa in amaute a zat nopna om nawnlo ahih manin amaute a thehthang hi. Amah in i makaite leh i siampite a awlmawh nawn kei hi
Huhna a ngenin ka khuadakdak uh a, khuadakzo nawnlo zah dongin ka om uh hangin bangmah ka ngah kei uh hi. A hong pia zolo ding minamte tungah huhna ka ngenngenkha uh hi
Galte in hong vilsim uh ahih manin ka vakkhia ngam kei uh hi. Ka hun uh a beita hi a, a beina hun a tungzo ahi hi
Mu akbawh sangin a manlang zaw-in amaute in a hong delh uh hi. Amaute in mualtung panin hong delhsuk uh a, theihkholh lohin a hong man khin uh hi
Amaute in galte' khutsung panin a hong huhzo dingin ka up uh, Pasian' teel a muan'huai kumpi a hong matsak uh hi
Edom leh Uz mite aw, tu-in nuinui mai un la, ahih theih laiteng kipak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh siatna hun hong tung ding a, a hong tun' ciangin na guaktangun omin, maizumin na om ding uh hi

Jerusalem in a mawhna thaman a sang khinzo ta ahi hi. Ka thuak ding uh a nasia penpen teng ka thuak khinzo ta uh hi. Ahi zongin Edom aw, Topa in nang gim hong pia ding a, na mawhna khempeuh a hong pholak ding hi.
